data.title: BNY Declares Dividends
data.description: On April 16, 2026, the Bank of New York Mellon Corporation (BNY) disclosed dividends for its common and preferred stock. The Board of Directors declared a quarterly dividend for common stock. This announcement affects the company's shares listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol BK. BNY, a prominent global financial services firm, continues to prioritize shareholder returns through these dividend declarations.

data.title: BNY Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In its recent financial report for the first quarter of 2026, The Bank of New York Mellon Corporation (BNY), a prominent financial services company traded on NYSE under the symbol BK, announced its quarterly results. The company shared earnings information and updates in a presentation.

data.title: After 35 Years with Parkinson's Disease and a Life-Threatening Infection, One Patient Reclaimed Independent Living
data.description: Shanghai, April 16, 2026 - Jiahui International Hospital commemorated World Parkinson's Day by showcasing a remarkable case illustrating the intricate care involved in advanced Parkinson's disease. The hospital highlighted the success of multidisciplinary teamwork in achieving functional recovery, even in the face of severe complications. This case underscores the hospital's commitment to providing holistic care for Parkinson's patients, emphasizing the importance of collaboration in treating complex medical conditions.

data.title: ITT to Release 2026 First Quarter Results and 2026 Outlook on Wednesday, May 6
data.description: ITT Inc. (NYSE: ITT) is set to announce its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 prior to the opening of the New York Stock Exchange on Wednesday, May 6.

data.title: Thompson Street Capital Partners Announces Sale of Data Dimensions to One Call
data.description: St. Louis-established middle-market private equity firm Thompson Street Capital Partners (TSCP) recently disclosed the sale of its portfolio company, Data Dimensions, LLC, to One Call, a prominent figure in ancillary services and care management for the workers’ compensation market, utilizing technology. Data Dimensions, headquartered in Janesville, Wisconsin since 1982, serves as a significant player in EDI clearinghouse and technology fields. The finances involved in this transaction were not made public.

data.title: Safe Harbor Financial Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results, Highlighting Sequential 12% Sales Growth, Balance Sheet Transformation and Operational Progress
data.description: On April 16, 2026, SHF Holdings, Inc., operating as Safe Harbor Financial, disclosed its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year concluding on December 31, 2025. Recognized as a prominent fintech entity catering to the banking, lending, and financial requirements within the regulated cannabis and hemp sectors, Safe Harbor shared the outcomes of its operations during this period. The company is listed as NASDAQ: SHFS.

data.title: Kraken Robotics Reports 2025 Financial Results
data.description: Kraken Robotics Inc. released its financial report for the fourth quarter and fiscal year ended on December 31, 2025. The company, listed under TSX-V: PNG and OTCQB: KRKNF, disclosed this information in St. John's, Newfoundland and Labrador, on April 16, 2026. Interested parties can access the audited consolidated financial statements for fiscal years 2024 and 2025, as well as the management's discussion and analysis for the same periods on SEDAR+ at www.sedarplus.ca.

data.title: Resolve AI announces Series A Extension at a $1.5B valuation and launches Resolve AI Labs to advance AI systems for complex production environments
data.description: In San Francisco on April 16, 2026, Resolve AI, a company specializing in AI for managing software in production, revealed it had secured $40 million in its Series A Extension. This funding round has propelled its valuation to $1.5 billion. The investment was primarily led by DST Global and Salesforce Ventures. The achievement comes a mere 18 months after Resolve AI's inception.

data.title: Inertial Labs, a VIAVI Solutions Company, Advances 3D Terrain and Surface Modeling with PCMasterPro 1.16 for RESEPI
data.description: In Chandler, Arizona on April 16, 2026, Inertial Labs, a VIAVI Solutions Inc. subsidiary (NASDAQ: VIAV), introduced PCMasterPro 1.16 - advanced software for 3D terrain and feature processing. This software offers enterprise-level capability and achieves up to a notable 200% increase in performance compared to previous versions.

data.title: KEYCORP REPORTS FIRST QUARTER 2026 NET INCOME OF $486 MILLION, OR $0.44 PER DILUTED COMMON SHARE INCREASING 33% YEAR-OVER-YEAR
data.description: Earnings showed a strong performance with a revenue of $1.95 billion, marking a 10% increase from the previous year. Noninterest income also recorded a notable growth of 8%. Net interest income saw a significant 11% increase year-over-year and a 1% increase quarter-over-quarter despite seasonal factors affecting the figures. The net interest margin stood at 2.87%, showing a sequential increase of 5 basis points. Additionally, period-end loans exhibited a $2.6 billion increase quarter-over-quarter.

data.title: Seoul's Myeongdong Now Has a Clinic Where Tourists Get K-Beauty Treatments Between Shopping
data.description: A new REBERRY Clinic has opened in Myeongdong, Seoul, catering to international tourists and their shopping itineraries. The clinic specializes in aesthetic treatments, including Botox injections. This expansion aims to attract a diverse clientele due to its convenient location.

data.title: Over Half (51%) of Consumers Want Promotions That Go Beyond a Basic Discount
data.description: In London, a recent report reveals that 51% of consumers are eager for innovative brand promotions, indicating they would be willing to try a new brand based on unique incentives. Despite this, many brands continue to rely on traditional discounts. The report, Creative Currencies in Promotions, was created in collaboration with Talon.One, a prominent platform managing loyalty and promotions for more than 300 major global brands. This study sheds light on the consumer preference for creative promotions over simple monetary discounts.

data.title: Top Wall Street Forecasters Revamp Netflix Expectations Ahead Of Q1 Earnings
data.description: Netflix will announce its first-quarter earnings after the market closes on April 16. Analysts predict earnings of 78 cents per share, an increase from 66 cents a year ago. Revenue is expected to reach $12.17 billion, up from $10.54 billion last year. The company has surpassed revenue forecasts in nine of the last ten quarters. Netflix's stock rose 1.4% to close at $107.71 on Wednesday. For more analyst ratings, visit Benzinga's Analyst Stock Ratings page.
